notes: Starter criteria set derived from ITI VPAT 2.5 (Nov 2023). Verify criterion text against official sources before publishing a real ACR.

sources.name: ITI VPAT 2.5 Template
sources.description: Official Voluntary Product Accessibility Template 2.5, published by the IT Industry Council (ITI), November 2023. Defines the structure and required chapters for a conformance report.

sources.name: WCAG 2.0
sources.description: Web Content Accessibility Guidelines 2.0 — W3C Recommendation, December 2008. Referenced by Section 508 as the normative web standard.

sources.name: WCAG 2.1
sources.description: Web Content Accessibility Guidelines 2.1 — W3C Recommendation, June 2018 (updated 2023). Adds criteria for mobile, low vision, and cognitive disabilities.

sources.name: WCAG 2.2
sources.description: Web Content Accessibility Guidelines 2.2 — W3C Recommendation, October 2023. Adds nine new success criteria.

sources.name: Section 508 of the Rehabilitation Act (36 CFR Part 1194)
sources.description: US federal law requiring ICT procured, developed, maintained, or used by federal agencies to be accessible. Refreshed January 2017 by the US Access Board.

sources.name: EN 301 549 V3.2.1
sources.description: Accessibility requirements for ICT products and services — European standard harmonised under the European Accessibility Act. Version 3.2.1, March 2021.
